title: OVF (Observatorio Venezolano de Finanzas) — Economic Situation Report and Economic/Social Bulletin
time_coverage: Informe de Coyuntura: through April 2024; Boletin: through December 2023
units: narrative report with embedded data tables (% inflation, GDP/activity indices); see PDF text
license_terms: OVF public reports (independent NGO, not government) — used per bookkeeping.md source-hygiene rules: independent/academic economic reporting, not a government source, cross-check against BCV/official series where compared
notes: OVF's site is a WordPress blog (observatoriodefinanzas.com); the closest thing to a raw-data download hub is /documentos-tecnicos/, a list of ~25 PDF research notes, policy briefs, and periodic bulletins (no CSV/XLSX time series found). Picked the two most data-dense/recent periodic bulletins containing OVF's independent inflation and economic-activity estimates in tabular form. IMPORTANT DATA QUALITY FLAG: Boletin-economico-y-Social-OVF-DIC-2023.pdf is served by the origin/CDN as EXACTLY 1,048,576 bytes (1MB) with NO %%EOF trailer (confirmed truncated/malformed PDF) — verified via two independent re-downloads plus an HTTP HEAD showing a matching ETag (W/"100000-...", 0x100000=1048576) from Cloudflare's cache, so this is what OVF's own server actually serves, not a fetch error on our end. Kept as a faithful mirror of the source per 'no fabricated data' rule; flagging here so downstream processing doesn't assume the file is complete. Informe-de-Coyuntura (2.3MB, 74pp) downloaded cleanly with a valid %%EOF trailer.
